title: BreadPack
description: A Fabric modpack designed as a replacement for a client.
body:
### Why?
I created BreadPack due to a need of a streamlined replacement for clients such as Lunar, offering more features and a clean UI. Here are some features:
### High Performance
Being based on Fabulously Optimized naturally results in outstanding performance as you can see [here](https://youtu.be/bb8G9X5Q_4I?si=1BRfGK_y7hBPpYiF), and if you have an Nvidia GPU you'll get even more performance due to the [Nvidium mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) (if you don't have an Nvidia GPU, don't worry as it automatically disables itself)
### Uses Essential
The Essential mod lets you add friends and chat with them, add cosmetics, share screenshots, and host worlds on your PC.
### QoL
BreadPack comes with many QoL mods such as BetterF3, Zoomify, Advancement Info, AppleSkin, ChatShot and many more.

### Other/To do
- Feedback form: https://forms.gle/TUP71PhRKTaepMxV7
- Mods that will be added once they update to 1.20.4: Smooth Swapping, KronHUD, Controlling, Better Ping Display
- Tidy up and update all the configs to YOSBR
- Add Discord Rich Presence
- Documentation
- Create a Discord server
### Credits

- Fabulously Optimized: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)

### Announcements
Alpha 2 coming soon! Just need KronHUD and Smooth Swapping to update
